title: The Shadow of The World
description: Adds more kinda of creepy and not creepy stuff to the game
body:
the shadow of the world adds...
- new items

- new mobs

- new blocks

- new biomes

If you have anything to ask my discord is
anomaly.1

![Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4a8151fd2c15ec78b1a286dff4ed1904f8baab3.png)

- The Lost Shadow

  - Found in the dark oak forest and the deep dark

  - Drops Void Shards
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50cd4dc2fd4985bcaca35f8b626dfdc61de36d17.png)
This does not show all items

 
- Void Shard

  - The void shard is one of the main things used to

  - craft the items in this mod

 

- The Void Sword

  - The void sword is a upgrade to the netherite sword

  - dealing 11 attack damage and gives wither to the

  - enemy
